---
subtitle: "step 11"
filters:
  - sorting-hat
  - ripper
extensions:
  sorting-hat:
    keep:
      - r
    verbose: true
  # ripper:
  #   include-yaml: false
  #   output-dir: "../pipeline"
  #   output-name: "01_mah_a_load_data"
  #   script-links-position: "none"
format: gfm
---

### Fish Consumption

First we read in the 

```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| deployment: main

#| sorting-hat: keep
library(dplyr)
library(here)
library(targets)

tar_load(
  c(mahery_files),
  store = here("_targets")
)
```

```{r}
#| deployment: main


#| sorting-hat: keep
dar_hh_fish_with_grams_no_weekly2 <- {
  x <- mahery_files
  tibble()
}
```


```{r}
#| deployment: main

#| sorting-hat: remove
dar_hh_fish_with_grams_no_weekly <- tibble()
```
